params._usdc: USDC token address on Arc Testnet              (native USDC: 0x3c499c542cEF5E3811e1192ce70d8cC03d5c3359 on Arc mainnet)              Use the correct testnet address from Circle docs.

params.initialLiquidityUsdc: USDC (6 decimals) to seed the AMM pool
params.question: Human-readable question, e.g. "Will USDC depeg below $0.99 by Dec 31, 2025?"
params.resolutionDeadline: Unix timestamp; resolution expected by this date

returns.market: Address of the newly deployed PredictionMarket

createMarket(string,string,uint256,uint2.notice: Deploy a new prediction market.         Caller must have approved this factory to spend `initialLiquidityUsdc` USDC.

getMarketInfo(address).notice: Returns all market info for a given market address.

getMarkets(uint256,uint256).notice: Paginated market list. Returns up to `limit` addresses starting at `offset`.
